subject: FRESH START - Read AGENTS.md then report status
body:
You are starting fresh with zero context. This is a system test after crash recovery.

## Your Identity
You are opencode, a coding agent running in Kilo with tool access.

## Required Actions (in order)

1. READ your AGENTS.md file at: S:/self-organizing-library/AGENTS.md
2. CHECK your inbox at: lanes/library/inbox/
3. VERIFY you have tool access by listing your available tools
4. REPORT back with:
   - Your lane identity (library)
   - Your working directory
   - Your available tools
   - Confirmation you read AGENTS.md
   - Any messages found in inbox

## Lane-Relay Protocol
- Your inbox: lanes/library/inbox/
- Your outbox: lanes/library/outbox/
- To send to Archivist: write to lanes/archivist/inbox/
- To send to SwarmMind: write to lanes/swarmmind/inbox/

## Expected Response Format
```
LANE: library
WORKING_DIR: S:/self-organizing-library
TOOLS: [list tools you can access]
AGENTS_MD: [CONFIRMED or NOT FOUND]
INBOX: [count of messages or EMPTY]
STATUS: [READY or ERROR: details]
```

Send response to: lanes/archivist/inbox/{timestamp}_library_status.json
terminal_decision: Obviated by convergence phases (HARDEN/STRESS/PUSH) - work completed 2026-04-23
